synopsis.regime_summary: Composite score holds at 38.0/100 maintaining ACCUMULATE regime with moderate confidence as Bitcoin remains in accumulation phase territory.
key_signals: Reserve Risk at 0.0011 confirms deep value territory (accumulation rule firing)
LTH-SOPR at 0.804 shows long-term holders realizing losses (accumulation rule firing)
Mayer Multiple at 0.897 indicates price below 200-day average (accumulation rule firing)
MVRV at 1.40 sits well below cycle-top threshold of 3.7 but above accumulation zone of 1.0
NUPL at 0.29 shows modest optimism, far from euphoria levels
synopsis.thesis: Bitcoin appears firmly entrenched in mid-cycle accumulation phase with 4 of 10 accumulation rules firing and zero cycle-top indicators active. The combination of LTH losses, extremely low Reserve Risk, and price trading below 200-day average suggests patient capital is being rewarded while weak hands capitulate. Current metrics indicate significant distance from both deep capitulation and cycle-top euphoria.
risk_factors: STH-MVRV near break-even at 0.96 could trigger further selling if momentum deteriorates
Transfer volume momentum below equilibrium at 0.87 suggests weakening network activity
synopsis.action_bias: Systematic ACCUMULATE bias remains appropriate as composite score of 38 sits well within the 25-45 accumulation range.
